property.name: SANDBOX HOTEL
property.address: 626/1 Karom Rd., Pho Sadet, Mueang, Nakhon Si Thammarat 80000, Thailand

roomTypes.name: Standard Twin
roomTypes.description: 2 single beds, 28 m2, mountain view, non-smoking. Amenities include TV, Wi-Fi, air-conditioning, and bathroom.

roomTypes.name: Superior Double
roomTypes.description: 1 double bed, 28 m2, non-smoking. Amenities include TV, Wi-Fi, air-conditioning, and bathroom.
roomTypes.rateSource: Derived from Standard Twin / Room Only; no separate base rate was set in the source system

Superior Double / Room Only is derived from Standard Twin / Room Only in the source system.
No seasonal rules, weekend surcharges, date overrides, or stop-sell rules were configured in the available Little Hotelier fields.

policies.privacyAndTerms: General consent for collection and use of personal data for service, booking, contact, and legal compliance.
policies.payment: Payment policy appears on the guest invoice, but no detailed platform payment rule is defined in the extracted data.
policies.childPolicy: Unavailable beyond the extra adult/child charge in room/rate configuration.

paymentMethods.notes: PayPal and SiamPay activation options were available but not active.

currentOperationalState.warning: This data is suitable for staging setup and configuration mapping only. It is not sufficient for safe production cutover without full live reservations, guests, payment records, folios, room closures, and final room status exports.

sourceNotes.authority: Pasted updated PMS migration data summary supplied on 2026-05-30 plus owner clarification that Double rooms are the remaining non-twin room numbers and staff labels are Tanyatorn, Neeq, HM, HK1-HK4, and FD.
sourceNotes.sourceBasis: sandbox_hotel_final_data.txt, compiled from Little Hotelier setup modules and a 14-day calendar view starting 2026-05-14.
sourceNotes.importStance: Staging/local import first. Do not production-import until missing live operational data is supplied and reconciled.
sourceNotes.doubleRoomInference: Superior Double rooms were assigned to the first 17 non-twin room numbers in the current physical numbering sequence: 201-211 and 301-306.
